nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Flame-crowned flowerpecker
nodes.summary: Flame-crowned flowerpecker（Flame-crowned flowerpecker，学名 Dicaeum kampalili），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于云雾森林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Preserved specimen at Naturalis Biodiversity Center It inhabits tropic moist montane forest at mossy forest above 1,300 meters above sea level. IUCN has assessed this bird as least-concern with its population being estimated as 10,000 to 19,999 mature individuals

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|Preserved specimen at Naturalis Biodiversity Center It inhabits tropic moist montane forest at mossy forest above 1,300 meters above sea level. IUCN has assessed this bird as least-concern with its population being estimated as 10,000 to 19,999 mature individuals

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Forest loss is a threat especially in its lower altitude limits which are more prone to legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmland
